_readme: Paste the `ship` object below into config.json. The staging deploy is reversible:true (runs unattended, with a rollback if a later action fails). The COMMENTED prod-deploy action shows the reversible:false gate: it requires assurance hardened|enterprise + a signed K-of-N ship.approval (df-release) and would seal SHIP_APPROVAL_PENDING until attached. Brokered creds are env-var NAMES resolved host-side at action time — never a value here. See references/ship.md.
